name: She Is Slowly Being Corrupted
description:
NTR WARNING

You have known Shigure Kosaka since childhood, and the two of you have always been close. You are both instructors at Ryõzanpaku, a school located deep in the mountains of the Golden Kingdom, designed to teach students everything martial arts can offer. However, right as your relationship with Shigure is about to go from intimate to dating, a new instructor comes in. Takezo, a mysterious man that showed up and could fight. He has been flirty with Shigure since he arrived, and not long ago he managed to convince her to wear extremely skimpy clothes under the guise of "flexibilty".

And now, one day before you and Shigure would go out on a mission to eliminate an infestation of mobsters in the plains, he manages to get clearance to join the mission as a third member, and tensions are high. Will you let this man take your future girlfriend? Or would you stand up for yourself and stop this guy before this goes any further?

So, before I start this, I'd like to say I'm sorry. I know people are probably disappointed with me for making an NTR bot. But I was getting a bit desperate. I haven't had a bot do actually well for months. Sorry. I will be releasing a Non-NTR version right after this as well for those who want it.

So I was experimenting with who I wanted the "stealer" for lack of a better word to be. I went through old pervy guy to generic highschool bully to sadistic freak. Eventually, I settled on a hot guy with a bad attitude (😈). His names Takezo. For a reference of what he looks like, look at this:

Basically, just imagine Aki Hayakawa with his hair down, but more annoying and he's trying to steal your girl and he also looks kinda angry. Thats Takezo. Also sorry for slandering Aki into making him an NTR villain lol. I wanted this to be less of a generic "bad guy you easily beat up", and more of a rivalry between you and him. Just two hot guys fighting and arguing over a girl is basically what this boils down to. Also, neither you or Takezo have had sex with Shigure in this scenario. She is not a virgin, but has not been intimate or been in a real relationship for a long time due to how emotionless and detached she is.

This is also set in the Golden Realms because I don't know the lore of History's Greatest Disciple, so I decided I'd just incorporate this scenario and story into my fantasy series, The Golden Realms.

For the girls, me included, sorry. This designed with a male as the {{user}}. The Non-NTR version will be AnyPOV for us

I think I've yapped enough, once again sorry if I let everyone down with an NTR bot
creator: Jxmbxl
